###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — XFCE
#  Source: etc/skel/.config/xfce4/xfconf/xfce-perchannel-xml/xfce4-keyboard-shortcuts.xml
#  Generated: 2026.06.08 by /kiro-keybindings-all-twms-xfce — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  alt + F1                    xfce4 whisker menu (app launcher)
  ctrl + super + alt          xfce4 whisker menu (alt trigger)
  alt + F2                    xfce4-appfinder collapsed
  alt + F3                    xfce4-appfinder
  super + d                   dmenu app launcher
  shift + super + d           dmenu app launcher (alt binding)
  super + ctrl + s            kiro-keybindings (cheatsheet)
  ctrl + Escape               xfdesktop desktop right-click menu
  super + Return              alacritty (terminal)
  super + t                   alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return         alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + KP_Enter       alacritty (terminal, numpad Enter)
  ctrl + alt + t              alacritty (terminal)
  F12                         xfce4-terminal drop-down
  super + h                   alacritty + btop (system monitor)
  ctrl + alt + End            alacritty + btop (system monitor)
  shift + super + Return      thunar (file manager)
  super + F8                  thunar (file manager)
  super + w                   default web browser
  super + F1                  default web browser
  XF86WWW                     default web browser (hardware key)
  HomePage                    default web browser (hardware key)
  ctrl + alt + f              firefox
  ctrl + alt + v              vivaldi-stable
  ctrl + alt + g              chromium
  ctrl + alt + i              kiro-iso-builder
  ctrl + alt + c              chromium (alt binding)
  ctrl + alt + o              opera
  ctrl + alt + b              brave
  ctrl + alt + d              obs
  XF86Mail                    default mail client (hardware key)
  super + F2                  VSCode (code editor)
  super + F3                  inkscape
  super + F4                  gimp
  super + F5                  meld (diff/merge tool)
  super + F6                  vlc (media player)
  super + F7                  virtualbox
  super + m                   lollypop (music player)
  super + F9                  virt-manager (virtual machine manager)
  super + F10                 spotify
  ctrl + alt + s              spotify
  super + v                   pavucontrol (volume control GUI)
  ctrl + alt + u              pavucontrol (alt binding)
  ctrl + alt + a              alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q              alacritty-tweak-tool (alt binding)
  ctrl + alt + e              archlinux-tweak-tool (ATT)
  ctrl + alt + p              pamac-manager (package manager)
  ctrl + shift + Escape       xfce4-taskmanager

── 2. Window Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + q                   close focused window
  shift + super + q           close focused window (alt binding)
  alt + Tab                   cycle windows forward
  alt + shift + Tab           cycle windows reverse
  super + Tab                 switch window (switcher popup)
  alt + F9                    minimize/hide window
  alt + F10                   maximize window
  alt + F11                   toggle fullscreen
  alt + F6                    toggle sticky (show on all workspaces)
  alt + F12                   toggle keep-above
  alt + F7                    move window (interactive drag)
  alt + F8                    resize window (interactive)
  alt + space                 window context menu
  shift + alt + Page_Up       raise window (bring to front)
  shift + alt + Page_Down     lower window (send to back)
  super + Escape              xkill — click to kill app
  ctrl + alt + Escape         xkill (alt binding)
  Up                          focus window above (nav mode)
  Down                        focus window below (nav mode)
  Left                        focus window left (nav mode)
  Right                       focus window right (nav mode)
  Escape                      cancel keyboard action

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  ctrl + F1..F12              switch to workspace 1–12
  ctrl + alt + Left           go to left workspace
  ctrl + alt + Right          go to right workspace
  ctrl + alt + Up             go to workspace above
  ctrl + alt + Down           go to workspace below
  ctrl + alt + KP_1..KP_9    move window to workspace 1–9
  ctrl + alt + Home           move window to previous workspace
  alt + Insert                add new workspace
  alt + Delete                remove current workspace

── 5. Multi-monitor ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + p                   display settings (quick dialog)
  XF86Display                 display settings (hardware key)

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioPlay               playerctl play-pause
  XF86AudioStop               playerctl pause
  XF86AudioPrev               playerctl previous track
  XF86AudioNext               playerctl next track

── 7. Screenshots ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Print                       xfce4-screenshooter full screen
  ctrl + Print                xfce4-screenshooter interactive GUI
  ctrl + shift + Print        xfce4-screenshooter region select
  ctrl + super + Print        flameshot GUI

── 8. System & Session ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ctrl + alt + l              archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + k              archlinux-logout (alt binding)
  super + x                   archlinux-logout (alt binding)
  shift + super + x           xfce4-session-logout (full dialog)
  ctrl + alt + m              xfce4-settings-manager
  ctrl + alt + n              xfce4-settings-manager (alt binding)
  ctrl + alt + comma          xfce4-settings-manager (alt binding)
  super + c                   conky-toggle
  ctrl + alt + Page_Up        conky-rotate next theme
  ctrl + alt + Page_Down      conky-rotate previous theme
  alt + n                     variety next wallpaper
  alt + p                     variety previous wallpaper
  alt + t                     variety trash wallpaper
  alt + f                     variety favorite wallpaper
  alt + Right                 variety next wallpaper (alt binding)
  alt + Left                  variety previous wallpaper (alt binding)
  alt + Up                    variety toggle pause
  alt + Down                  variety resume
